Literal.Value:
'{
  "$schema": "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json",
  "width": 580,
  "height": 530,
  "padding": 10,
  "autosize": "none",
  "background": "#0f172a",
  "data": [{"name": "dataset"}],
  "signals": [
    {"name": "hasData", "update": "length(data(''dataset'')) > 0"},
    {"name": "vBase", "update": "hasData ? data(''dataset'')[0][''Base de Datos''] : 0"},
    {"name": "vCont", "update": "hasData ? data(''dataset'')[0][''Contactados''] : 0"},
    {"name": "vLuz",  "update": "hasData ? data(''dataset'')[0][''Interactuaron con Luz''] : 0"},
    {"name": "vCon",  "update": "hasData ? data(''dataset'')[0][''Solicitaron Conexión''] : 0"},
    {"name": "pCont", "update": "hasData ? data(''dataset'')[0][''% Contactados''] : 0"},
    {"name": "pLuz",  "update": "hasData ? data(''dataset'')[0][''% Interactuaron con Luz''] : 0"},
    {"name": "pCon",  "update": "hasData ? data(''dataset'')[0][''% Solicitaron Conexión''] : 0"},
    {"name": "maxW",  "value": 370}
  ],
  "marks": [
    {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 300}, "y": {"value": 26}, "align": {"value": "center"}, "fontSize": {"value": 18}, "fontWeight": {"value": "bold"}, "fill": {"value": "#e2e8f0"}, "text": {"value": "Embudo de Interacciones"}}}},
    {"type": "rect", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 195}, "y": {"value": 50}, "width": {"signal": "maxW"}, "height": {"value": 68}, "cornerRadius": {"value": 8}, "fill": {"value": "#3b82f6"}, "fillOpacity": {"value": 0.9}}}},
    {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 188}, "y": {"value": 88}, "align": {"value": "right"}, "fontSize": {"value": 12}, "fill": {"value": "#94a3b8"}, "text": {"value": "Base de Datos"}}}},
    {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 205}, "y": {"value": 88}, "fontSize": {"value": 20}, "fontWeight": {"value": "bold"}, "fill": {"value": "#ffffff"}, "text": {"signal": "format(vBase, '','')"}}}},
    {"type": "rect", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 195}, "y": {"value": 150}, "width": {"signal": "vBase > 0 ? maxW * vCont / vBase : 0"}, "height": {"value": 68}, "cornerRadius": {"value": 8}, "fill": {"value": "#6366f1"}, "fillOpacity": {"value": 0.9}}}},
    {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 188}, "y": {"value": 188}, "align": {"value": "right"}, "fontSize": {"value": 12}, "fill": {"value": "#94a3b8"}, "text": {"value": "Contactados"}}}},
    {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 205}, "y": {"value": 188}, "fontSize": {"value": 18}, "fontWeight": {"value": "bold"}, "fill": {"value": "#ffffff"}, "text": {"signal": "format(vCont, '','') + ''  ·  '' + format(pCont, ''.1%'')"}}}},
    {"type": "rect", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 195}, "y": {"value": 250}, "width": {"signal": "vBase > 0 ? maxW * vLuz / vBase : 0"}, "height": {"value": 68}, "cornerRadius": {"value": 8}, "fill": {"value": "#8b5cf6"}, "fillOpacity": {"value": 0.9}}}},
    {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 188}, "y": {"value": 288}, "align": {"value": "right"}, "fontSize": {"value": 12}, "fill": {"value": "#94a3b8"}, "text": {"value": "Interactuaron con Luz"}}}},
    {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 205}, "y": {"value": 288}, "fontSize": {"value": 18}, "fontWeight": {"value": "bold"}, "fill": {"value": "#ffffff"}, "text": {"signal": "format(vLuz, '','') + ''  ·  '' + format(pLuz, ''.1%'')"}}}},
    {"type": "rect", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 195}, "y": {"value": 350}, "width": {"signal": "vBase > 0 ? maxW * vCon / vBase : 0"}, "height": {"value": 68}, "cornerRadius": {"value": 8}, "fill": {"value": "#10b981"}, "fillOpacity": {"value": 0.9}}}},
    {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 188}, "y": {"value": 388}, "align": {"value": "right"}, "fontSize": {"value": 12}, "fill": {"value": "#94a3b8"}, "text": {"value": "Solicitaron Conexión"}}}},
    {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 205}, "y": {"value": 388}, "fontSize": {"value": 18}, "fontWeight": {"value": "bold"}, "fill": {"value": "#10b981"}, "text": {"signal": "format(vCon, '','') + ''  ·  '' + format(pCon, ''.1%'')"}}}}  
  ]
}'
